General.Name: Century Legend Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Century Legend (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hair styling business in Hong Kong and Macau. It operates through six segments: Hair Styling, Money Lending, Property Investments, Securities Investments, Hospitality Services, and Property Project Management. The company offers hair styling services and related product sales; commercial and personal loans; and invests in and rents commercial and residential properties. It also invests in listed equity securities, as well as in equity-linked investments; and provides hospitality and property related project management services. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of properties management, interior and property project management, travel agency, and hospitality services; trading securities; license and hostel license holding; and operation of a hair salon under the Headquarters brand name. The company was formerly known as Fortei Holdings Limited and changed its name to Century Legend (Holdings) Limited in December 2000. Century Legend (Holdings) Limited was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Capital Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
